assignments.name: Assign_Catering_Work_Details_0
assignments.label: Assign Driving Work Details - Years Experience

assignments.name: Assign_Driving_Work_Details_Other_Info
assignments.label: Assign Driving Work Details - Other Info

assignments.name: Assign_Driving_Work_Details_Points_on_Licence
assignments.label: Assign Driving Work Details - Points on Licence

assignments.name: Assign_Driving_Work_Details_Years_Licence_Held
assignments.label: Assign Driving Work Details - Years Licence Held

Flow.description: PT1-1314 - Fix Personal form looping issue

formulas.name: Driving_Commercial_Refrigerated_Conviction_Details
formulas.expression:
IF ({!Add_Work_Detail_Row.Driven_commercially__c}=TRUE, "Previous commercial driving experience. ", "No previous commercial driving experience. ") + IF ({!Add_Work_Detail_Row.Refrigerated_Vehicles__c}= TRUE, "Previous experience driving refrigerated vehicles. ", "No previous experience driving refrigerated vehicles. ") + IF ({!Add_Work_Detail_Row.Drink_Driving_or_Insurance_Convictions__c} = TRUE, "Current has drink driving/insurance convictions.

", "No drink driving/insurance convictions.

")

formulas.name: Driving_Competency_Row
formulas.expression: IF (ISBLANK({!Highest_Vehicle_Class}), IF( ISBLANK({!FLT_Row}), NULL, {!FLT_Row} ), IF( ISBLANK({!FLT_Row}), {!Highest_Vehicle_Class}, {!Highest_Vehicle_Class}&", "&{!FLT_Row} ) )

formulas.name: Highest_Bus_Licence
Highest_Lorry_Licence
Rating_Row
formulas.expression: "<tr>" + TEXT({!Add_Rating_Row.sirenum__Rank__c}) + " rating received on " + TEXT({!Add_Rating_Row.CreatedDate}) + " by " + {!Add_Rating_Row.sirenum__Account__r.Name} + "</tr>"

Flow.label: Screen Flow - Candidate Persona Form (Migration)

recordLookups.name: Get_Key_Competencies
recordLookups.label: Get_Key_Competencies
recordLookups.filterLogic: (1 AND 2 AND (3 OR 4 OR 5 OR 6 OR 7 OR 8 OR 9 OR 10 OR 11 OR 12 OR 13 OR 14 OR 15 OR 16)) OR (1 AND 3 AND 17 AND 18)

recordUpdates.name: Update_Candidate
recordUpdates.label: Update Candidate with Perm Work as Yes

recordUpdates.name: Update_Candidate_0
recordUpdates.label: Update Candidate with Perm Work as No

validationRule.errorMessage: Scheduler comments cannot be longer than 255 characters.

fields.name: Interview_Notes_Display_0
fields.fieldText:
Interview Notes ﻿(by {!Get_Candidate.Interview_Conducted_By__r.Name__c} on {!Get_Candidate.Date_Interview_Conducted__c})

{!Get_Candidate.Interview_Notes__c}

fields.name: Last_BA_Contact_Display_0
fields.fieldText:
Last Blue Arrow Contact:

﻿{!Get_Last_Logged_Call.Owner:User.Name__c} made a {!Get_Last_Logged_Call.IP_ActivityType__c} to the candidate on {!Get_Last_Logged_Call.ActivityDate}.


Call Comments:

{!Get_Last_Logged_Call.Description}

fields.name: Work_History_0
fields.fieldText: Blue Arrow Work Activities

fields.name: LastApplicationDisplay
fields.fieldText:
Last Application: Applied for {!Get_Last_Application.TR1__Job__r.Name} job by {!Get_Last_Application.Account__r.Name} on {!Get_Last_Application.CreatedDate};

Status: {!Get_Last_Application.TR1__Stage__c}

fields.name: Last_Job_Offer_0
fields.fieldText: ﻿Last Job Offer: Applied for {!Get_Last_Job_Offer.sirenum__Shift__r.sirenum__Team__r.Name} job by {!Get_Last_Job_Offer.Site__c} on {!Get_Last_Job_Offer.CreatedDate}; Status: {!Get_Last_Job_Offer.sirenum__Status__c}

fields.name: Rating_Title
fields.fieldText: Negative Rating

fields.name: Rating_Display_0
fields.fieldText: ⚠ {!Rating_Info}
